description_long: This is a large, tracked combat tactical vehicle with a robust, armored exterior and a prominent forward-mounted cannon. The vehicle features a boxy, angular hull with reinforced panels and visible rivets, suggesting heavy armor protection. Large, spoked road wheels and continuous tracks run along both sides, providing mobility over rough terrain. The front section houses a substantial artillery piece, with a protective gun shield and additional structural reinforcements. The rear compartment appears enclosed, likely for crew or equipment, and the vehicle's surface is finished in a matte, olive-drab color with subtle weathering. Small details such as hatches, vents, and a few red markings are visible, enhancing its utilitarian, military appearance.
description: A heavily armored, tracked combat vehicle with a large forward cannon and boxy, reinforced hull in olive-drab paint. Features include spoked road wheels, continuous tracks, and subtle red markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, armored face with the main cannon and gun shield centered between the tracks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long barrel of the cannon, spoked road wheels, and the boxy, armored hull with visible hatches and red markings.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the flat, armored back with two large panels and the ends of the tracks.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cannon, tracks, and spoked wheels, with additional red markings near the front.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large forward-mounted cannon with a gun shield; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, flat armor panels; reinforced around the front and gun shield; visible rivets and modular sections.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive-drab paint with weathering; no distinct camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: Red markings on the front corners and side; no visible insignia or numbers.
